message:
bd-ml2r: fix bridge detection in diagnostics and cycle scorer

fnx_diagnostics: Bridge edge span lookup now uses resolved_node_id()
to correctly handle Port endpoints (not just Node endpoints).

fnx_cycle_scorer: bridge_count was incorrectly initialized from
bridges_result which may include non-edge bridges. Now computed
incrementally during scoring loop when is_bridge flag is set.

Also added assertion in test to verify parallel edges don't count
as bridges (0 expected, not whatever bridges_result returns).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
